title: How The Local Render Pipeline Works
subtitle: A mechanism map from source article to shareable artifact

compositionDecision.rationale: The article explains components, dependencies, and data flow.

alternatives.reason: Use when detailed prose is more important than structure.

summary: Miao Vision keeps data local by turning article claims into a structured spec, validating it, and rendering a self-contained artifact.

items.text: The pipeline converts source content into a validated artifact without uploading data.
The agent owns interpretation while the CLI owns deterministic validation.
The artifact remains self-contained and shareable.
